description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a striking blue and black color scheme. The body is constructed primarily from metal with polymer components, including a collapsible stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The handguard is ventilated and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, which is capped with a prominent muzzle brake. A detachable box magazine is inserted into the lower receiver, and a compact optical sight is mounted on the top rail. The rifle also includes a vertical foregrip for improved control and stability during firing. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet robust firearm suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern blue and black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, optical sight, vertical foregrip, and muzzle brake.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue receiver, collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, optical sight, and muzzle brake.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake, barrel, and alignment of the handguard and foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, pistol grip, and the full length of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the collapsible stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the upper receiver.
